Add a ballet video

Paste any YouTube link — a normal youtube.com/watch?v=…, a youtu.be/… share link, or just the 11-character video ID. The video plays right here on the stage, flipped into mirror view so Evelyn can follow along like a real studio mirror. 🪞

Grown-up settings

Edit mode is now on — you’ll see ↑ ↓ ✎ 🗑 buttons next to each item, plus “Add” buttons. Turn it off with the Grown-up button when you’re done.

🔥 100-Day Challenge

Set which day the challenge started on, so it matches real life (Evelyn's violin challenge is on day 41).

💾 Back up progress

Evelyn's progress is saved automatically on this device's browser, and it is kept even when the app is updated — updating the page never erases her stars or streak. To copy progress to a different device, save the backup here and load it there.

📥 Restore progress

Paste a backup code here and load it.

⭐ Adjust her stars

Add or take away stars from the total (handy for rewarding practice done away from the app, or fixing a miscount). She has 0 stars now.

📼 Offline videos (no Wi-Fi at the studio)

The ballet school has no internet, so YouTube links won't load there. You have two ways to make a video play offline:

1. Import into the app (easiest on iPad). Tap Import file next to a video and pick the saved .mp4. It's stored inside the app on this iPad and plays with no internet — even after closing the app. (Big files can take a moment to save.)

2. ballet_assets folder. If you host the app yourself, drop the file into a folder called ballet_assets next to index.html and set its name in the video's ✎ Edit ▸ source as ballet_assets/name.mp4. No import needed.

Order of play: imported file → ballet_assets folder → YouTube (online only).

🪞 Mirror view

Every video plays flipped left↔right, like dancing in front of a studio mirror — so when the teacher lifts their right arm, it matches Evelyn's right arm. Tap the 🪞 Mirror button under the stage any time to flip it back to normal (handy for choreography that calls out real left/right). The setting is remembered.

🩰 Reward stickers

The shop's stickers are the hand-made AI ballet art, built right into the app — no files to download or host. Evelyn buys them with her stars and pins them around the stage in Decorate mode.

♻️ Reset

Clear all progress and start fresh (this can't be undone).
